title: elytrigia intermedia subsp. gentryi
intro: Elytrigia intermedia subsp. gentryi, also known as Gentry's wheatgrass or Gentry's wildrye, is a subspecies of the Elytrigia intermedia plant, a type of grass native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The health benefits of Elytrigia intermedia subsp. gentryi include its potential to treat various ailments, such as arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for internal use, or applied topically in the form of salves or creams for skin conditions.
